expectations.text: Recommends a polyglot-capable orchestrator (Bazel, Pants, or Moon) — not Turborepo
expectations.evidence: Recommends Pants: 'Pants is the best match when Python is meaningful in the stack... while still supporting Go and JS/TS workflows'. Also mentions Moon and Bazel as alternatives.

expectations.text: Provides a directory structure showing all three languages coexisting
expectations.evidence: Full tree: apps/web (React), services/ (Go), pipelines/training (Python), packages/ (per-language SDKs), proto/, gen/

expectations.text: Addresses protobuf sharing with a shared definitions directory and per-language codegen
expectations.evidence: proto/ directory with buf.yaml + buf.gen.yaml generating into gen/go, gen/python, gen/typescript. Full Buf config provided.
Full CODEOWNERS file with per-directory ownership: /proto/ @org/platform @org/backend, /pipelines/ @org/ml, /apps/web/ @org/frontend

expectations.text: Includes at least one config example for the chosen orchestrator
expectations.evidence: Full pants.toml with backend_packages for Python, Go, JavaScript, source roots, Python resolves, Go version, and changed-since config
